summary: Audit Center feature testing completed - All backend APIs pass (12/12 tests), Frontend UI working correctly with proper formula display and all new features functional

issues: Partial Cash and Split Cash rows not visible in current data (but API returns them correctly when data exists)

backend_api.Cash formula components: PASSED - starting_float, cash_sales, total_partial_cash, total_split_cash, total_cash_ar, net_fund_transfers, total_cashier_expenses, expected_cash
backend_api.AR payments with fund_source: PASSED - Includes fund_source field to separate cash vs digital
backend_api.Fund transfer details: PASSED - capital_to_cashier, safe_to_cashier, cashier_to_safe with details list
backend_api.Expense verification status: PASSED - Expenses include verified boolean and has_receipt indicator
backend_api.Unverified section structure: PASSED - expenses_count, expenses_no_receipt, po_count, po_no_receipt, severity
backend_api.Partial/Split invoice details: PASSED - partial_invoices and split_invoices lists with invoice_number
backend_api.Payables with PO details: PASSED - po_details list with po_number and vendor
backend_api.Overall severity for all sections: PASSED - All sections include severity rating

frontend_ui.Audit Center page loads: PASSED - Page loads with Run Audit, Discrepancies, Prepare for Audit, Audit History, Security Flags tabs
frontend_ui.Run Audit button works: PASSED - Clicking triggers API call and displays results
frontend_ui.Overall Audit Score: PASSED - Shows 96/100 score in top right
frontend_ui.Score summary grid: PASSED - Shows Cash, Sales, AR, Payables, Transfers, Returns, Activity, Unverified tiles with severity colors
frontend_ui.Cash formula display: PASSED - Formula shown with all components correctly
frontend_ui.Expense detail list: PASSED - Expandable list shows category, fund_source badge, verified/unverified badge, receipt indicator, employee name, amount
frontend_ui.Unverified Items section: PASSED - Shows 3 unverified expenses with 'Needs Review' status
frontend_ui.No receipt warnings: PASSED - 7 'No receipt' warnings displayed with warning icon

critical_code_review_comments: Cash reconciliation formula correctly matches Closing Wizard: Starting Float + Cash In (Cash Sales + Partial Cash + Split Cash + Cash AR) + Net Fund Transfers - Cashier Expenses
Unverified section correctly identifies expenses and POs without admin/auditor verification
Receipt indicators properly show 'No receipt' warning for items without uploaded receipts
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 4 expenses (1 verified, 3 unverified), 2 sales_log entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Center fully tested with Feb 2026 data for Branch 1. Cash reconciliation shows balanced (₱16,760.00). Unverified Items section shows 3 unverified expenses with 'No receipt' warnings. All drill-down lists work - expenses, AR payments, fund transfers, partial/split invoices. Score summary grid includes new 'Unverified' tile. Overall score calculation includes unverified section severity.

verified_test_ids.view-receipt-{id}: View receipt button for expenses with receipts
